applications.title: Comprehensive Thermal Dissipation Solutions
applications.subtitle: Providing professional thermal management solutions for various industries from consumer electronics to industrial applications

wearables.title: Wearable Device Thermal Dissipation
wearables.description: Providing lightweight, high-performance thermal dissipation solutions for smartwatches, AR/VR glasses, and health monitoring devices. Our designs ensure devices maintain optimal temperatures during extended operation while preserving slim product profiles.
wearables.app1: Smartwatch Heat Dissipation Module - Ultra-thin design with precise temperature control
wearables.app2: AR/VR Glasses Cooling System - Comfortable wearing experience for extended periods
wearables.app3: Health Monitoring Devices - Precise temperature control for accurate data

industrial.title: Industrial Application Thermal Dissipation
industrial.description: Providing reliable thermal dissipation solutions for industrial manufacturing, testing equipment, and precision instruments. Our products undergo rigorous testing to maintain stable performance in harsh environments.
industrial.app1: CNC Machinery Cooling - High-precision temperature control
industrial.app2: Testing Equipment Cooling - 24/7 continuous operation support
industrial.app3: Precision Instrument Cooling - Strong environmental adaptability

automotive.title: Automotive Thermal Management Systems
automotive.description: Providing highly reliable thermal dissipation solutions for electric vehicle batteries, power systems, and vehicle electronics. Our designs comply with automotive industry standards ensuring optimal performance under various driving conditions.
automotive.app1: Battery Management System - Safe and reliable temperature control
automotive.app2: Power Electronics Cooling - High-efficiency power conversion
automotive.app3: Vehicle Electronics Cooling - Extreme environment adaptation

dataCenter.title: Data Center Thermal Dissipation
dataCenter.description: Providing enterprise-grade thermal dissipation solutions for servers, switches, and high-power power supplies. Our system design effectively reduces data center energy consumption and improves overall efficiency.
dataCenter.app2: Cabinet Thermal Management - Overall temperature equilibrium
dataCenter.app3: Power Module Cooling - Reliability and efficiency combined

networking.title: Network Communication Thermal Dissipation
networking.description: Providing professional thermal dissipation solutions for 5G base stations, network switches, and communication equipment. Our designs ensure stable network connectivity is maintained in high-temperature environments.
networking.app1: 5G Base Station Cooling - High-power density cooling
networking.app2: Switch Heat Dissipation Module - Reliable connection assurance
networking.app3: Communication Power Cooling - Long-term stable operation

cta.title: Ready to Solve Your Thermal Management Challenges?
cta.description: Our expert team is ready to provide customized solutions for your projects. No matter how complex your requirements are, we can find the most suitable solution.

about.pageSubtitle: A group of engineers passionate about thermodynamics, dedicated to transforming complex theories into elegant solutions.
about.storyPart1: Therlect was founded in 2019 by a group of experienced thermal flow engineers. We believe that thermal management is not only a science but also an art.
about.storyPart2: We have witnessed the rapid development of electronic product performance and solved the resulting thermal dissipation challenges. From early passive cooling to today's active liquid cooling and phase-change technology, we have always been at the forefront of technology.
about.storyPart3: Beyond thermal management, we have expanded our vision to infrared technology, exploring the broad applications of thermal energy in human health and industrial applications. We are not just your supplier, but your most trusted strategic partner in the thermal energy field.
about.coreValuesSubtitle: The beliefs and principles that guide us forward
about.innovationDesc: We are never satisfied with the status quo, continuously exploring the boundaries of thermodynamics, and applying new technologies to more possibilities.
about.precisionDesc: From simulation analysis to manufacturing, we strive for perfection in every data point and every tolerance.
about.partnershipDesc: Working closely with customers to face challenges together. Your success is our greatest achievement.
about.joinUsDesc: We are always looking for talented individuals passionate about thermodynamics. If you want to drive technological progress, we welcome you to join Therlect.
about.conflictFreeMineralsIntro: Therlect Thermal Management Technology Co., Ltd. is committed to supporting responsible sourcing practices and pledges not to purchase or use conflict metals.
about.backgroundText: Armed rebel organizations in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) and surrounding countries have caused numerous social and environmental problems through metal mining and trade, including human rights violations and armed violence. Such metal minerals include: Tantalum (Ta), Tin (Sn), Tungsten (W), Cobalt (Co), and Gold (Au). Metals from the DRC and adjacent conflict zones are known as Conflict Minerals.
about.commitmentText: To defend human rights and mitigate armed conflicts in the Democratic Republic of Congo and neighboring countries, Therlect supports the Conflict-Free Sourcing Initiative (CFSI) established by the Electronic Industry Citizenship Coalition (EICC) and the Global e-Sustainability Initiative (GeSi).
about.commitment1: We do not purchase conflict metals produced in conflict areas of the Democratic Republic of Congo and surrounding countries.
about.commitment2: We require our suppliers not to use conflict metals from conflict areas. If from conflict areas, they must come from third-party verified conflict-free mines. If conflict minerals are unintentionally used in our products, suppliers must notify us immediately so we can take necessary measures.
about.commitment3: We conduct due diligence on our suppliers' metal sources. We use the CFSI Conflict Minerals Reporting Template (CMRT) as our investigation form, requiring suppliers to disclose mineral sources and sign conflict-free mineral commitment letters. We expect our suppliers to jointly comply with our conflict-free minerals policy. Through responsible sourcing management, we ensure that our and our suppliers' sourcing comes from non-conflict areas and meets customer and regulatory requirements.

solutionsPage.pageSubtitle: From concept to mass production, we provide one-stop thermal management services to help you shorten development cycles and enhance product competitiveness.
solutionsPage.conceptAndDesignShort: Conduct preliminary thermal assessment based on customer requirements and propose multiple feasible thermal dissipation solutions.
solutionsPage.simulationAndAnalysisShort: Use professional software for detailed thermal simulation and structural analysis to predict potential issues.
solutionsPage.prototypeAndTestingShort: Rapidly prototype and conduct real-world testing to verify result accuracy.
solutionsPage.productionAndManufacturingShort: Integrate supply chain resources to provide high-quality, efficient mass production services.
solutionsPage.qualityAndOptimizationShort: Continuously track product quality and optimize designs based on market feedback.
